# TradingToolsHub

> TradingToolsHub is a comprehensive, independent directory of trading tools, platforms, brokers, and software. We provide honest reviews, side-by-side comparisons, pricing breakdowns, and feature analysis. Our goal is to help traders find the right tools for their style without pay-for-placement bias.

## About
- [About](https://tradingtoolshub.com/about/): Who we are and editorial standards
- [Methodology](https://tradingtoolshub.com/methodology/): 5-factor weighted review scoring
- [RSS Feed](https://tradingtoolshub.com/feed.xml): Recently updated reviews
